meaning: n.[妞峕瀛愬泭鑿岀被鐨勮崏
examples: Usually the fungus is an ascomycete but occasionally it is a basidiomycete.
Her mycological focus is ascomycete microfungi, and their taxonomic and methodological challenges.
Hymenium (pl. hymenia) A layer of the fruiting body of certain ascomycete and basidiomycete fungi in which the asci or basidia are borne.
